args.name: target
args.description: Target file or directory to link to

args.name: link_name
args.description: Name of the link to create

name: -s
--symbolic
options.description: Create a symbolic link instead of a hard link

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Print name of each linked file

name: -n
--no-dereference
options.description: Treat symlink destination as a normal file

name: -r
--relative
options.description: Create symbolic links relative to link location

name: -b
--backup
options.description: Make a backup of each existing destination file

name: -t
--target-directory
options.description: Specify the target directory for the links

name: -T
--no-target-directory
options.description: Treat link name as a normal file always
